V=0.160.0
BASE=https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/three@$V
mkdir -p vendor/three/addons/postprocessing vendor/three/addons/shaders
# core build
curl -s -o vendor/three/three.module.js $BASE/build/three.module.js
# postprocessing addons
for f in EffectComposer Pass RenderPass ShaderPass MaskPass UnrealBloomPass OutputPass; do
  curl -s -o vendor/three/addons/postprocessing/$f.js $BASE/examples/jsm/postprocessing/$f.js
done
# shaders
for f in CopyShader LuminosityHighPassShader OutputShader; do
  curl -s -o vendor/three/addons/shaders/$f.js $BASE/examples/jsm/shaders/$f.js
done
echo "=== sizes ==="
ls -la vendor/three vendor/three/addons/postprocessing vendor/three/addons/shaders
echo "=== check import lines in addons ==="
